name: vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-discovery
description: MyndHyve market-intel.ai-discovery — AI-powered source-discovery via one ctx.callAI. Given a topic + optional industry/audience/platforms, returns relevant URLs, communities (with platform / relevanceScore / estimatedPostCount), and search queries. Replaces the manual URL-input step of the marketIntel research pipeline. Third marketIntel pack of the Stage 5 cohort.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: AI Source Discovery
nodes.description: Single AI call. Inputs: topic (required) + industry / audience / platforms / minUrls / minCommunities / minQueries (all optional). Returns sources (URL array) + communities (sorted by relevanceScore desc) + searchQueries. URLs filtered to http(s):// OR reddit-style 'r/<name>'; invalid entries dropped with warnings.
